description: Soleeya 12 Pairs Newborn Socks Roll Top 0-1 years old A great pair of socks takes you further—where comfort meets journey Features Soft and gentle to wear Baby roll top socks are made of 75% high quality combed cotton, which reduces friction and has good breathability, moisture wicking, keeping baby's little feet dry at all times and away from stuffy heat and discomfort. White flip sock design, fashionable and practical These baby socks are designed to be mid-calf height, the flap can effectively prevent the socks from slipping off, and also add a touch of playfulness to the baby's outfit, the socks have good elasticity, and stretch freely with the baby's little feet, without hindering the baby's activities. Multiple pairs to meet daily needs 0 - 1 year old babies grow fast and consume socks quickly. The 12 pairs of baby socks are perfect for everyday use, whether playing at home, going out for a walk, or attending a party, they go well with all kinds of outfits. Washing Advice Hand wash as much as possible, if using a washing machine, you need to put the white baby socks into a laundry bag, please do not wash them together with clothes that are easy to lose colour to avoid the socks being stained. The temperature of the water should be 30℃ or below, too high water temperature will destroy the structure of cotton fibre and make the socks shrink and deform, which will affect the fit of the socks. It is recommended to use neutral detergent to wash, avoid using detergents containing bleaching ingredients, fluorescent agents or strong alkaline detergents, in order to prevent damage to the cotton fibres, resulting in socks fading and hardening. Specifications Color: White Material: Cotton, Spandex Suitable Ages: 0-1 years Package Includes 12 Pairs x Cotton Baby Crew Socks
